note: Created shared test harness at tests/common/mod.rs with: create_tunnel_pair(), create_handshaked_tunnel_pair(), drive_handshake(), feed_packet(), make_ipv4_packet(), and WireGuard packet field extractors (msg_type, receiver_index, counter).
